basis: GL-052 Product Core E2E Flow Test
GL-061 Demo Runner / API Smoke Script

contractStrengths.title: OpenAPI specification exists and is parseable
contractStrengths.description: docs/openapi.yaml documents the full HTTP surface including paths, methods, request/response schemas, and security schemes.

contractStrengths.title: Expected paths are present and legacy paths are guarded
contractStrengths.description: backend/tests/test_gl055_integration_contract_readiness.py verifies expected paths and rejects known legacy paths.

contractStrengths.title: Minimal API usage walkthrough aligns with OpenAPI paths
contractStrengths.description: docs/minimal_api_usage_walkthrough.md maps every Product Core stage to a concrete OpenAPI path verified against docs/openapi.yaml.

contractStrengths.title: Demo runner performs successful dry-run validation
contractStrengths.description: scripts/demo/gl061_api_smoke.py validates manifests and referenced examples locally without network access.

contractStrengths.title: Full backend test suite passes with zero failures
contractStrengths.description: python3 -m unittest discover backend.tests -v runs with 0 failures and 0 errors.

contractStrengths.title: Non-production constraints are explicitly documented
contractStrengths.description: Every checklist, walkthrough, and decision document notes that auth, deployment, observability, and multi-tenancy are not production-ready.

productionBlockers.title: Contract freeze process is not established
productionBlockers.description: No documented versioning strategy, breaking-change policy, or contract review cadence exists.

productionBlockers.title: Auth semantics are not production-grade
productionBlockers.description: Several endpoints document security blocks that are not fully enforced; the contract describes a target model, not the current implementation.

productionBlockers.title: Error responses need stronger standardization
productionBlockers.description: ErrorResponse schema is referenced consistently but lacks strict enforcement, per-status-code examples, and documented mappings.

productionBlockers.title: Schema examples need expansion
productionBlockers.description: Many request and response schemas do not include illustrative examples.

productionBlockers.title: Endpoint versioning policy is not formalized
productionBlockers.description: Paths such as /decision-provenance/v2/build indicate URL versioning, but the policy is undocumented.

productionBlockers.title: Compatibility/deprecation policy is not formalized
productionBlockers.description: No documented rule for how long legacy paths remain supported or how breaking changes are communicated.

productionBlockers.title: CI contract validation may need hardening
productionBlockers.description: GL-055 checks path presence and legacy-path absence but does not validate schema completeness or semantic correctness.

productionBlockers.title: External SDK/client expectations are not finalized
productionBlockers.description: Without a frozen contract, generated clients would be unstable.

pilotPermittedScope: Review docs/openapi.yaml to understand the current HTTP surface.
Run backend/tests/test_gl055_integration_contract_readiness.py to verify expected paths and legacy-path absence.
Follow docs/minimal_api_usage_walkthrough.md to trace Product Core stages through documented API paths.
Run scripts/demo/gl061_api_smoke.py --dry-run for local confidence checks.
Inspect static JSON examples in docs/examples/gl057/ and docs/examples/gl058/.
contractClaimStopConditions: Contract freeze process is missing or undocumented.
Auth semantics remain unaligned between OpenAPI and implementation.
Error responses lack a standardized schema with per-status-code examples.
Versioning or compatibility policy is undefined.
Production-Ready API contract is claimed accidentally or implicitly.

nextRecommendedOptions.title: Implement P0 contract-hardening workstreams
nextRecommendedOptions.description: Execute the seven P0 workstreams defined in docs/api_openapi_contract_hardening_review.md to reach a production-grade contract baseline.

nextRecommendedOptions.title: Local API Smoke v2 / planned-call validation
nextRecommendedOptions.description: Extend the GL-061 demo runner to produce a machine-readable report mapping every OpenAPI path to an example or fixture.
